package main import ( "html" "strings" ) func BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr string, toAddr string, userName string, subject string, feedbackContent string) (emailBody string, err error) { // Clean header values by replacing newlines cleanFrom := strings.ReplaceAll(fromAddr, "\n", " ") cleanTo := strings.ReplaceAll(toAddr, "\n", " ") cleanSubject := strings.ReplaceAll(subject, "\n", " ") // Escape user input for HTML rendering safeUser := html.EscapeString(userName) safeSubject := html.EscapeString(subject) safeContent := html.EscapeString(feedbackContent) // HTML email template htmlBody := ` User Feedback Received

Subject: ` + safeSubject + `

Feedback:

` + safeContent + `
` // Construct email headers headers := "From: " + cleanFrom + "\r\n" + "To: " + cleanTo + "\r\n" + "Subject: " + cleanSubject + "\r\n" + "MIME-Version: 1.0\r\n" + "Content-Type: text/html; charset=\"UTF-8\"\r\n\r\n" return headers + htmlBody, nil } func main() { // Example usage from := "user@example.com" to := "support@company.com" user := "John Doe" subject := "Feature Request" content := "I would love to see a dark mode option in the next app update!" body, _ := BuildFeedbackEmail(from, to, user, subject, content) println(body) }

package main import ( "bytes" "fmt" "html" "mime" "mime/quotedprintable" "strings" ) // BuildFeedbackEmail constructs an HTML-formatted email containing user feedback func BuildFeedbackEmail(fromAddr string, toAddr string, userName string, subject string, feedbackContent string) (emailBody string, err error) { const boundary = "feedback_boundary" var header bytes.Buffer header.WriteString("From: " + fromAddr + "\r\n") header.WriteString("To: " + toAddr + "\r\n") header.WriteString("Subject: " + mime.QEncoding.Encode("UTF-8", subject) + "\r\n") header.WriteString("MIME-Version: 1.0\r\n") header.WriteString("Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary=\"" + boundary + "\"\r\n\r\n") var body bytes.Buffer body.WriteString("--" + boundary + "\r\n") body.WriteString("Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\r\n") body.WriteString("Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable\r\n\r\n") body.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("User Feedback\r\n\r\nUser Name: %s\r\nSubject: %s\r\nFeedback:\r\n%s\r\n", userName, subject, feedbackContent)) body.WriteString("\r\n--" + boundary + "\r\n") body.WriteString("Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8\r\n") body.WriteString("Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable\r\n\r\n") var htmlContent bytes.Buffer fmt.Fprintf(&htmlContent, `

User Feedback

User Name: %s

Subject: %s

Feedback:

%s

`, html.EscapeString(userName), html.EscapeString(subject), html.EscapeString(feedbackContent), ) htmlWriter := quotedprintable.NewWriter(&body) if _, err := htmlWriter.Write(htmlContent.Bytes()); err != nil { return "", err } htmlWriter.Close() body.WriteString("\r\n--" + boundary + "--\r\n") return header.String() + body.String(), nil } // Example main function demonstrating usage func main() { email, err := BuildFeedbackEmail( "user@example.com", "support@example.com", "John Doe", "Test Feedback", "This is a test feedback content.", ) if err != nil { fmt.Println("Error:", err) return } fmt.Println("Generated Email:") fmt.Println(strings.ReplaceAll(email, "\r\n", "\n")) }
